name: Enver Gortash
description:
When offered a chance to retain his title and position in exchange for aid against the Nether Brain, Enver Gortash has one extra condition that you'll have to agree to if you wish to see Baldur's Gate and your friends survive the upcoming battle of a lifetime.

Marry him. 

An arranged marriage scenario

Breeding kink, dom Enver
creator: pookiepoodle
